name: refrakt-md
description: A content framework built on Markdoc

scripts.build: npm run build -w packages/types -w packages/transform -w packages/behaviors && npm run build -w packages/runes && npm run build -w runes/marketing -w runes/docs -w runes/storytelling -w runes/places -w runes/business -w runes/design -w runes/learning -w runes/media && npm run build -w packages/lumina -w packages/highlight -w packages/sveltekit -w packages/html -w packages/astro -w packages/nuxt -w packages/next -w packages/react -w packages/vue && npm run build -w packages/content -w packages/ai && npm run build -w packages/eleventy -w runes/plan && npm run build -w packages/create-refrakt -w packages/editor && npm run build -w packages/cli && npm run build -w packages/mcp
scripts.version-packages: changeset version && node scripts/sync-rune-versions.mjs && node scripts/generate-changelog.mjs && npm install --package-lock-only
